# Isotenor Mapping

**Summary**: Mapping of equal values (concentration) to visualize the distribution of a variable.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]] used isotenor maps to show the distribution of P2O5 % within each horizon.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Isotenor maps for Horizon 1 showed higher values concentrated in the central basin elongated NW-SE. ([[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996, p. 49]])
